title: Work Ticket Context
description: Input for work/draft-ticket-reply.sh. Describes a single Jira (or Jira-like) ticket plus Fritz's intent so Shay can draft a reply and a suggested status transition for human approval. NEVER auto-sent.

ticket_id.description: Jira-style key, e.g. AMA-1423 or NIBS-77.

project.description: Logical workstream / project this ticket belongs to (e.g. AMA, NIBS).

status.description: Current ticket status, e.g. 'In Progress', 'In Review', 'Blocked'.

assignee.description: Current assignee display name or email.

reporter.description: Who raised the ticket / who Fritz is replying to.

priority.description: Jira priority. Optional; influences drafted tone/urgency.

latest_comment.description: The most recent comment on the ticket that Fritz is responding to.

intent.description: Fritz's plain-language note about what he wants the reply to accomplish. This is the steering signal for the draft.

suggested_transition.description: Optional explicit target status Fritz wants. If omitted the draft proposes one from the intent.
